name: Fimbulvetr
description:
Request from @EterliaGts.

Fimbulvetr is a character from Fire Emblem Heroes. Known as the winter of annihilation as part of Ragnarök, she is a major antagonist of Book X.

I'll update this when she gets more.

Anyways, Denki's tunes time

Dragon Ball Z Dokkan Battle: LR Metal Cooler Revival OST (Extended)

Dragon Ball Z Dokkan Battle: LR Dr. Wheelo Intro OST (Extended)

(Dr. Wheelo is kind of fitting though. Ice related robots.)
